description_long: This is a single athletic running shoe featuring a vibrant lime green upper with dynamic black and gray accent lines that create a sense of motion. The shoe has a low-cut profile with a padded black collar and heel counter for comfort and support. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with black and white laces, and the tongue is integrated into the upper for a streamlined look. The midsole is white and appears cushioned, designed for shock absorption and comfort during running or walking. The outsole is lime green with a subtle tread pattern, providing grip and traction. A stylized, silver geometric logo is visible on the side, adding a distinctive brand element.
description: A lime green athletic running shoe with black and gray accents, a white cushioned sole, and a stylized silver logo on the side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the lime green upper, black collar, dynamic accent lines, and a prominent silver logo.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the black padded heel counter and the white midsole wrapping around the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same accent lines and logo, with the shoe's arch and sole curvature visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the criss-cross lacing, rounded toe, and the integrated tongue design.
attribute_logo: stylized silver geometric logo on the side panel
